name: Chimichangas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. If the tortillas are not soft, wrap them in aluminum foil and warm in the oven for about 5 minutes, then keep warm.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 400 degrees.
4. Fold over the bottom third of each tortilla to create a solid base.
5. Spread 1/3 cup of meat filling on the solid base.
6. Roll the base and filling up once, so that the fold is centered and widest part of the tortilla.
7. Fold in each side of the tortilla and roll again until you have a neat package.
8. Secure the seam with toothpicks.
9. Fry three chimichangas at a time for about 8 to 10 minutes until golden brown.
10. Drain on several layers of paper towels.
11. Sprinkle cheese over the tops and garnish as desired.
Cooking time: 8 to 10 minutes
